form.formComment: Returns from a 34-day let-up. Last start 9th of 12 at this track on March 4 over 900m, 5.5 len behind Rule Maple with 56kg at $66.40. The start before that made ground from midfield; 3rd of 12 at this track on February 3 over 900m, 2.75 len behind Chocolat Bread with 56kg at $5.30. Better off looking to others.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resumes off a 36 day letup. First-up ran last of 13 at this track on February 2 over 1400m, 19 len behind Miss Margaux with 56kg at $53.90. Second run from a spell second last of 12 at this track on March 2 over 1400m, 10 len behind Kaseno Rao with 56kg at $51.10. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 34-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 12 at this track on March 4 over 900m, 2 len behind Rule Maple with 56kg at $2.60. The start before that 3rd of 12 at this track on February 4 over 900m, 2.75 len behind Tony Prince carrying 56kg at $4.10. Can build on that encouraging effort last start.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently won by a head at Funabashi March 31 over 1000m defeating Mana Flash carrying 53kg at $18.30. Before that crossed from a wide gate to lead but couldn't hold on when 4th of 14 at Funabashi on March 11 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Eis Lindy carrying 53kg at $10.70. Sure to be right there at the business end.
